text: Cannot be a stronghold province. This province gets +2 strength for each honor token on it. Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province - place 1 honor token on it.
name: Fortified Assembly

text: Seeker role only. Reaction: After this province is revealed - search your dynasty deck for a character card and put it faceup into a non-stronghold province you control, discarding each other card in that province. Shuffle.
name: Emperor's Summons

text: Action: Sacrifice a (friendly) character. Choose a character - until the end of the phase treat that character as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits).
name: Student of Anatomies

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - during each player's next action opportunity in this conflict, increase the cost to play cards by 1.
flavorText: "Victory without honor is no victory at all."
name: Graceful Guardian

text: No attachments except Weapon. During conflicts in which you are the attacking or defending player, X is equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand. (Otherwise, X is zero.)
name: Iron Crane Legion

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - gain 1 fate from an unclaimed ring.
flavorText: "If I can provide some solace to those less fortunate, then perhaps I will understand my Champion's wisdom."
name: Togashi Yoshi

text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose a deck - look at the top 3 cards of that deck and put them back in any order.
flavorText: "I recognized the ink that had been used, as one whose meesage could be hidden by clever alchemy."
name: Truthseeker

text: Interrupt: When a glory count would begin, if you are more honorable than your opponent - ready this character.
flavorText: "It is as if she has told us each a unique tale, yet the words in the telling are all the same." - Miya Matsuo
name: Ikoma Kiyono

text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict - until the end of the conflict, each participating non-Bushi character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] and each participating Bushi character gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political].
name: Righteous Delegate

text: Limit 1 per deck. Reaction: After fate is removed from characters in the fate phase. If 4 or more fate was removed - gain 2 fate.
name: Starry Heaven Sanctuary

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character controlled by your opponent - your opponent guesses the name of a card. You may reveal your hand. If you do, and the named card is not in your hand, move the chosen character home.
name: Emissary of Lies

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict - your opponent discards the top card of his or her conflict deck. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: With promises of fine wine, awaiting riches, and beautiful entertainment, Ryokō Owari Toshi can break even the most stouthearted of samurai.
name: Licensed Quarter

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a [clan-unicorn] character and a non-[clan-unicorn] character controlled by the same player - bow one of those characters. Then, ready the other.
flavorText: "Have you already become a Nehiri, Ryōma-san?" - Utaku Yumino
name: Ide Ryōma

text: Sincerity. Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character - until the end of the conflict, treat that character as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits).
name: Hantei Daisetsu

text: Interrupt: When attached character is sacrificed - return this card to your hand.
flavorText: The builder's axe makes no distinction between wood or skull.
name: Sharpened Tsuruhashi

text: Reaction: After a Bushi character you control attacks alone - your opponent cannot declare more than 1 character as a defender in this conflict.
flavorText: "If your skill with a blade is even half of what you have boasted, you will face me alone like a true samurai."
name: Issue a Challenge

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating unique character – that character gets +3[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. (+5[conflict-military] instead if that character has won a duel this conflict). (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Rising Stars Kata

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict in which you control a participating Courtier character - set the bid on your honor dial to 1 and draw cards equal to the difference between your honor bid and that of your opponent. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Regal Bearing

text: Action: Play up to 3 Spell cards with printed total cost 5 or less from your hand without paying their costs. (This includes costs other than fate costs.)
flavorText: "No longer will your disrespect go ignored, either by me or by the kami of this place."
name: Invoke the Divine

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict - dishonor each participating non-Courtier character.
flavorText: No one had informed the Hida visitors that gifts were expected for such an informal visit, but that didn't make their empty hands any less disgraceful.
name: Unspoken Etiquette

text: Attach to a Courtier character you control. Action: During a conflict, give your opponent 1 honor - switch attached character's base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skills until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "Beware the Ide with empty hands." - Ujik proverb
name: Natural Negotiator

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict - your opponent reveals a random card from his or her hand and puts it on top of his or her conflict deck. If you control a participating Courtier character, you may give your opponent 1 honor to resolve this ability twice.
name: Overhear
